title: Architectural Considerations of Information-Centric Networking (ICN) Using a Name Resolution Service
abstract: This document describes architectural considerations and implications related to the use of a Name Resolution Service (NRS) in Information-Centric Networking (ICN).  It explains how the ICN architecture can change when an NRS is utilized and how its use influences the ICN routing system.  This document is a product of the Information-Centric Networking Research Group (ICNRG).
